title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.819 - Brokerage business to be operated under actual names of persons or corporations, violation, penalties
text:
443.819.  Brokerage business to be operated under actual names of persons or corporations, violation, penalties. — 1.  No person engaged in a business regulated by sections 443.701 to 443.893 shall operate or engage in such business under a name other than the real names of the persons conducting such business, a corporate name adopted pursuant to law, or a fictitious name registered with the secretary of state's office.
  2.  Any person who knowingly violates this section is guilty of a class A misdemeanor.  A person who is convicted of a second or subsequent violation of this section is guilty of a class D felony.
(L. 1994 S.B. 718 § 5, A.L. 2001 S.B. 538, A.L. 2009 H.B. 382, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
